title: pulsatilla × refulgens
intro: Pulsatilla × refulgens, also known as Meadow Anemone or Pasque Flower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Pulsatilla × refulgens include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat menstrual cramps, insomnia, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress. Pulsatilla × refulgens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in homeopathic remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
